mapper.insert: insert into seckill_coupon ( name, original_price, seckill_price, stock, limit_per_user, status, create_time, update_time, start_time, end_time) values (#{name}, #{originalPrice}, #{seckillPrice}, #{stock}, #{limitPerUser}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
select count(*) from seckill_coupon
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')

select id, name, original_price as originalPrice, seckill_price as seckillPrice, stock, limit_per_user as limitPerUser, status, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from seckill_coupon where start_time <= now() and end_time >= now() and status = 1 -- 只查询有效状态的秒杀券 order by start_time desc
